title: ophrys × macchiatii nothosubsp. neokelleri
intro: Ophrys × macchiatii nothosubsp. neokelleri is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, known for its unique and distinctive appearance. As a medicinal plant, Ophrys × macchiatii nothosubsp. neokelleri has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing pain and swelling, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × macchiatii nothosubsp. neokelleri are typically made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the leaves to make a powder for later use.
